description: Versioned sidecar manifest for Kilo orchestrator commands. Stores stage dependencies, gates, compatibility aliases, lifecycle transitions, and capability references that the documented frontmatter (description, agent, model, subtask) cannot hold. Neutral vocabulary only: work item (not issue), change request (not pull/merge request), repository host (not provider-specific names).

agent_model.orchestrator: composes leaves and sub-orchestrators by name; returns completed|skipped|blocked|failed per stage
agent_model.leaf: single bounded write or read; returns one structured packet
agent_model.subtask: delegated scoped work; returns one packet

stages.name: inventory
stages.returns: reports, work items, branches, change requests, comments, reviews, checks, automation state

stages.name: resolve
stages.returns: one item resolved or bounded burn-down

stages.name: reconcile
stages.returns: remote/local sync of work items, change requests, labels, findings, branches

gates: stop if any prerequisite returns blocked|failed|invalid
mutation stages (5, 7, 8, 10) require completed discovery (stage 1)
integration, release, and deployment require explicit confirmation or predeclared policy
read-back after every mutation leaf
a blocked or failed prerequisite stops later mutation stages

code-review.md.role: evidence-first repository review producing a remediation-ready report
gates: stop if a leaf returns blocked|failed|invalid
read-back after every mutation leaf

code-review-deep-confirm.md.role: deep confirmation of report findings via comparative experiment
gates: stop if a leaf returns blocked|failed|invalid
read-back after every mutation leaf
one finding at a time; never parallelize skip/confirm or report edits

code-review-report-resolution.md.role: sequential bounded burn-down of resolvable report findings
gates: stop if a leaf returns blocked|failed|invalid
read-back after every mutation leaf
select next eligible finding deterministically by severity, dependency, report order
change-request secrecy: never mention report path, finding IDs, severity labels in commit/PR text
one finding at a time; no parallel edits, branch ops, or validation

code-review-remediate-finding.md.role: single-finding remediation composed of verify/experiment/implement/validate/warn/cleanup leaves; delegated to a specialist
gates: stop and return packet if a leaf returns disproven|blocked
read-back git status before returning the packet
never commit, branch, push, open PRs, or edit reports (main agent only)

issue-resolution.md.role: resolve one Ready work item via the canonical one-item procedure
gates: stop if issue-resolution-gate returns stop_not_ready|stop_closed
work the item only when the gate returns proceed
read-back both remote and local state after every mutation

change-request-comment-resolution.md.role: inventory and sequential resolution of actionable change-request comments
gates: stop if inventory returns blocked or the actionable queue is empty
push before reply on every iteration; never reply before validation passes
read back reply and thread state after each iteration
one comment at a time; no parallel edits or validation

change-request-conflict-resolution.md.role: resolve merge conflicts on a change request (subtask, not an orchestrator)
gates: stop on validation failure
never force-push, force-delete, or reset without explicit confirmation
do not change change-request status here

automation-run-resolution.md.role: resolve one failed automation run — inspect, reproduce, fix, retry the failed scope
gates: stop if inspect returns blocked|invalid
skip fix/retry when reproduce returns not_feasible and no changed hypothesis
retry is distinct from cancel and delete; require explicit confirmation or predeclared policy
at most one retry per changed hypothesis; mark Blocked on a second identical hypothesis

pull-request-comment-resolution.md.notice: deprecated compatibility alias; redirect inputs to the neutral contract

pull-request-conflict-resolution.md.notice: deprecated compatibility alias; redirect inputs to the neutral contract

transitions.Blocked: return to prior active state only when the blocker is removed

lifecycle.resolution_gate: only Ready work items are picked up by resolution

capabilities.transport_priority: MCP > native CLI > raw API via CLI > local git (local-only ops)
capabilities.rule: never claim an unsupported capability without a fallback or blocking path

report_model.filename_rules: NNN is zero-padded; <slug> is lower-kebab-case from the finding title, <=40 chars; the filename never renames after creation (the title lives in frontmatter)

frontmatter_schema.single_source_of_truth: frontmatter is canonical for finding metadata; never duplicate metadata as **Key:** lines in the body

report_model.finding_identity: the finding ID IS the file; findingFileFromId(dir, id) resolves F-NNN-*.md
report_model.directory_operations: queue/dependency/dedup operations scan the report directory of finding files reading frontmatter only — no Findings Summary table exists
report_model.prior_findings_index: dedup and prior-findings harvest read each finding file's frontmatter (id, title, category, status), never the bodies
